abilities.name: Looked After
abilities.description: At the start of each encounter your partner Digimon gains temporary HP equal to your Love rank.

abilities.name: Quiet Determination
abilities.description: Once per encounter when your partner Digimon takes damage, they gain +1 to all attack rolls for the rest of this round. It stacks up to +3.

abilities.name: I Can Do This
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Love rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter when your partner Digimon's HP drops below half their maximum for their current stage, they gain +2 to all damage rolls for the rest of the encounter.

abilities.name: Protect Them Back
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Love rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter when an enemy Digimon adjacent to your partner Digimon initiates a grapple against an allied Digimon, you may force that grapple to target your partner Digimon instead.

abilities.name: Growing Up
abilities.requirements: I Can Do This, Looked After, Love rank 5
abilities.description: Once per session at the start of an encounter, your partner Digimon's temporary HP from Looked After is doubled.

abilities.name: Steady Resolve
abilities.description: Once per encounter when your partner Digimon is targeted by a grapple, your partner Digimon gains +3 to their grapple resistance check.

abilities.name: Not a Kid Anymore
abilities.description: Once per session as a Free Action on your turn, you may spend any amount of your own HP — leaving yourself at a minimum of 1 HP — to grant that same amount as temporary HP to yourself, your partner Digimon, and all allied Digimon currently on the field.
